creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text: There really isn't enough information here.  At the very least we need to see the stack trace.  If this bug were fresher, I would ask you to provide that information.  But since it's been so long, I'll assume that you can no longer reproduce it, and close the issue.  If you can reproduce it, then by all means reopen the bug and provide a stack trace.
